name: Jump Penguin Final
short_description: This is the final chapter of the Jump Penguin series. This is a classic platformer game where you aim for the goal with simple controls. Touch the giant penguin in the sky. Missing a giant penguin? …Hit the jump to find out.
detailed_description:
About the game

Even if you can't fly, you can still jump.

I want to live on your island of Langerhans.


Gameplay

Let's jump and reach the goal
If you are a good jumper, you can jump up to 3 times!
Be careful as you can only jump up to 2 times if you are bad at jumping!
The flight distance changes depending on the jump timing, so it's exciting even after the first jump!
Touch the giant penguin in the sky.

Missing a giant penguin?

You'll know when you jump.


Movement: WASDor left stick
Viewpoint movement: Mouse or right stick
Jump: Space key or A button
Options menu: O key



Streaming and video

If you want to publish your gameplay on a video posting site or a streaming site, you will need the ability to talk.
